name: Kent's Cherry Cuba Libre Jell-o Shots
recipeIngredient: 1 small box cherry jello (do not use black cherry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Jello and boiling water according to package instructions, then let cool.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: cold Coca-Cola and white rum.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into 2-ounce cups or a large pan, then blend it into the cooled Jello-water mixture.
4. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator until set.
5. If using a large pan, cut the jello shots into smaller 2-ounce servings before serving.
Here are the shooters that Vickey sent Nancy Pallota (on the Country email list). Vickey asks you to beware of the strength of these goodies and to consume them cautiously.
